steps.title: Calculate the slope from the table
steps.content:
Using any two points from the table, compute slope. Take $(18, 130)$ and $(23, 160)$:

$$m = \frac{160 - 130}{23 - 18} = \frac{30}{5} = 6$$

steps.title: Find the equation of line h
Translate down 5 units and find the x-intercept of line k
steps.content:
Translating line h down 5 units subtracts 5 from the $y$-intercept:

$$y = 6x + 22 - 5 = 6x + 17$$

To find the $x$-intercept of line k, set $y = 0$:

$$0 = 6x + 17$$
$$6x = -17$$
$$x = -\frac{17}{6}$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
